tagline: Admins can now set spending thresholds for Unity AI Gateway usage.
what_it_does: Budgets allow administrators to define spending thresholds specifically for Unity AI Gateway, enabling tracking of monthly expenses through filters applied to billing records. Admins can create shared or per-user thresholds, with options for alerts or blocking usage when limits are reached. This functionality also extends to Genie product usage within Unity AI Gateway budgets.
why_it_matters: This feature enhances financial control and governance for organizations using Unity AI Gateway, allowing for better budget management and cost predictability. By setting thresholds, companies can prevent unexpected overspending, ensuring that resources are allocated efficiently and effectively.
plain_summary: Budgets allow administrators to define spending thresholds specifically for Unity AI Gateway, enabling tracking of monthly expenses through filters applied to billing records. Admins can create shared or per user thresholds, with options for alerts or…

capabilities.title: Shared Thresholds
capabilities.desc: Set a collective spending limit for all users within the budget scope.

capabilities.title: Per-User Thresholds
capabilities.desc: Establish individual monthly spending limits for each user.

capabilities.title: Usage Alerts
capabilities.desc: Configure email notifications when spending thresholds are reached.

capabilities.title: Usage Blocking
capabilities.desc: Prevent further requests through Unity AI Gateway when budgets are exhausted.

prerequisites: Unity AI Gateway enabled for your account.
use_cases: Monitor and control monthly spending on Unity AI Gateway.
Set individual spending limits for different users in an organization.
Receive alerts for budget thresholds to manage costs proactively.
limitations: Currently tracks only pay-per-token and ai_query (batch) inference.
Provisioned throughput and external-model inference are not tracked.
A small amount of spend beyond the threshold may still occur when blocking usage.

steps.title: Enable Unity AI Gateway
steps.desc: Ensure Unity AI Gateway is enabled for your account.

steps.title: Create a Budget
steps.desc: Select Unity AI Gateway as the resource type when creating a budget.

steps.title: Set Thresholds
steps.desc: Define shared and per-user thresholds based on your organization's needs.

steps.title: Configure Actions
steps.desc: Choose whether to send alerts or block usage when thresholds are reached.

steps.title: Monitor Spending
steps.desc: Regularly check budget status and adjust thresholds as necessary.

key_takeaway: Budgets for Unity AI Gateway provide essential financial controls, enabling organizations to manage their AI spending effectively.
